# End-to-End Application Testing

Execute the full E2E testing workflow in [.claude/commands/e2e-test.md](../../.claude/commands/e2e-test.md): pre-flight (platform, frontend, agent-browser), parallel research (structure, database, bug hunt), start app, create task list, user journey testing with agent-browser CLI and database validation, cleanup, and report.
